verdict.summary: Documentation-only change adding an honest scoping note to bench/CATALOG.md clarifying that FedBench / LargeRDFBench federation suites are roadmap-only (require SPARQL SERVICE execution + a source-selection planner across 9+ endpoints), and that the existing federation-fedshop entry is a smaller local FedShop-shaped comparison that does not claim FedBench/LargeRDFBench coverage. Claims verified against the repo: federation-fedshop is a real registered suite (bench/benchmarks.toml:1806, bench/service-fed-loopback/README.md, bench/federation/) and is described as a local FedShop-shaped SERVICE comparison vs Comunica, consistent with the note. No hard-coded performance numbers, no ZK/MPC/privacy claims, no overclaim; the note correctly narrows scope rather than expanding it. Prose is well-formed and slots cleanly into the existing 'Notes on a few that need care' bullet list. No correctness, soundness, test-validity, or security concerns for a markdown-only diff.
